body.purpose: Dense file, settings, admin, and dialog UI.

label.purpose: Short structural labels, metadata, and status.

mono.purpose: IDs, URLs, checksums, code, archive IDs, and technical values.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.value: 0 4px 8px color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 5%, transparent), 0 16px 36px color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 12%, transparent)

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Small action hover and focus feedback.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Nav, row, and button state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for classic forms and entry surfaces.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:10px; min-height:44px; border:0; border-radius:14px; padding:0 18px; background:var(--primary); color:var(--primary-foreground); font:600 14px var(--font-switzer, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 8px 20px color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 6%, transparent); transition:background 120ms ease, transform 120ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 88%, var(--foreground) 12%); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 62%, transparent); outline-offset:4px; } .ds-button-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); }

components.name: Workspace Nav Link
components.description: Desktop sidebar navigation link with active bronze state.
components.html: Home
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; padding:7px 10px; border-radius:8px; color:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 62%, transparent); background:transparent; font:500 13.5px var(--font-switzer, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); text-decoration:none; transition:background 140ms ease, color 140ms ease; } .ds-nav-link svg { width:15px; height:15px; opacity:.7; flex-shrink:0; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 6%, transparent); color:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 88%, transparent); } .ds-nav-link-active { background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 9%, transparent); color:color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 80%, var(--foreground) 20%); font-weight:600; } .ds-nav-link-active svg { opacity:1; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline:2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 62%, transparent); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.html: <label class="ds-search"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3M10.5 18a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 0-15 7.5 7.5 0 0 1 0 15Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg><input placeholder="Search files and folders" /></label>
components.css: .ds-search { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 4%, transparent); color:var(--muted-foreground); font:400 13.5px var(--font-switzer, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); } .ds-search svg { width:14px; height:14px; opacity:.7; flex-shrink:0; } .ds-search input { width:100%; min-width:0; border:0; padding:0; background:transparent; color:var(--foreground); font:inherit; outline:none; } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color:color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 55%, transparent); box-shadow:0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 18%, transparent); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Small operational state label for admin health and file state.
components.css: .ds-status-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; width:max-content; border-radius:999px; padding:4px 8px; background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 12%, var(--card)); color:color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary) 72%, var(--foreground) 28%); font:700 12px var(--font-switzer, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); line-height:1; }

components.name: Transfer Panel
components.description: Persistent floating upload and download panel.
components.css: .ds-transfer { width:340px; background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 4px 16px color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 12%, transparent); overflow:hidden; color:var(--foreground); font-family:var(--font-switzer, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); } .ds-transfer header { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:8px; padding:10px 12px; } .ds-transfer strong { font-size:13px; font-weight:500; } .ds-transfer button { width:22px; height:22px; border:0; border-radius:4px; background:transparent; color:var(--muted-foreground); cursor:pointer; } .ds-transfer button:hover { background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 8%, transparent); color:var(--foreground); } .ds-transfer-row { display:grid; gap:4px; padding:8px 12px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); } .ds-transfer-row span { font-size:12px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; } .ds-transfer-row small { font-size:11px; color:var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-transfer-row div { height:3px; overflow:hidden; border-radius:2px; background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); } .ds-transfer-row i { display:block; height:100%; border-radius:2px; background:var(--primary); transition:width .3s ease; }

components.name: Mobile Bottom Sheet Action
components.description: Coarse-pointer action row used in mobile sheets.
components.css: .ds-sheet-action { display:flex; min-height:44px; align-items:center; gap:12px; width:100%; padding:0 12px; border:0; border-radius:10px; background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 4%, transparent); color:var(--foreground); font:600 14px var(--font-switzer, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif); text-align:left; cursor:pointer; } .ds-sheet-action svg { width:18px; height:18px; color:var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-sheet-action:hover { background:color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 8%, transparent); } .ds-sheet-action:focus-visible { outline:2px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring) 62%, transparent); outline-offset:2px; }

narrative.overview: Staaash should feel like a dependable file drive that happens to be open source, not a developer console with a file list attached. The visual system is calm, practical, and self-owned: warm neutral surfaces, bronze actions, compact navigation, flat rows, and direct status language. It should make install, upload, share, restore, upgrade, and admin health feel understandable.
keyCharacteristics: Warm light workspace with bronze actions and calm dark alternatives.
Flat lists and rows by default, with borders and tonal fills doing most hierarchy work.
Cabinet Grotesk for brand and page titles, Switzer for dense product UI.
Compact controls, visible focus, restrained motion, and no decorative blur.
Owner/admin states are operational, explicit, and scan-friendly.

rules.name: The Accent Means Action Rule
rules.body: Bronze is for primary actions, active state, focus, progress, and selected state. Do not use it as decoration.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Warm neutrals are structural, not nostalgic. They make the file content readable and owned, not paper-themed or cute.

rules.name: The Honest Red Rule
rules.body: Destructive red appears only when an action or state can harm, block, or permanently remove something.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: Workspace and admin UI use fixed rem sizes. Fluid type belongs to entry/onboarding moments, not file lists, buttons, or settings.

rules.name: The Label Restraint Rule
rules.body: Uppercase labels are allowed only for short structural labels. Never use uppercase body copy.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Lifted Rule
rules.body: Lists, nav, rows, and page sections are flat at rest. Use tonal hover and border changes first; use shadow only when the object floats over the page.

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: Decorative blur and glassmorphism are forbidden. Dialog overlays use tint, not blur.

dos: Do keep file content, filenames, metadata, and status more prominent than chrome.
Do use warm neutral surfaces and 1px borders for hierarchy before adding shadow.
Do reserve Owned Bronze for action, active state, focus, selected state, and progress.
Do keep mobile and tablet actions complete: upload, navigation, selection, action sheets, sharing, and recovery all need coarse-pointer behavior.
Do make admin health and beta-risk states explicit with direct labels and status chips.
Do keep focus visible with the ring token and at least a 2px outline or halo.
Do use Cabinet Grotesk for Staaash identity and page titles, then return to Switzer for dense task UI.
donts: Don't make Staaash feel like Nextcloud Files at its worst: crowded, gray, chrome-heavy, and hard to scan.
Don't use generic SaaS productivity polish where operational clarity is needed.
Don't hide ownership, storage, backup, restore, or upgrade risk behind vague commercial-cloud status text.
Don't create a homelab tool that treats confusing setup, vague errors, or missing recovery guidance as acceptable because the user is technical.

Don't imply platform scope before the core drive is dependable. Microservices, desktop sync, native mobile, S3-compatible storage, and complex collaboration permissions are not v1 default visual assumptions.
Don't turn repeated rows into cards. Use flat rows, separators, and hover states.
Don't use glassmorphism, decorative blur, gradient text, colored side stripes, oversized shadows, or ornamental motion.
Don't put destructive actions in bronze or hide them behind ambiguous labels.
